project_type: React 18 SPA with Vite, luxury fashion portfolio site
build_system: Vite with TypeScript compiler check (tsc -b) before build
test_framework: No test framework configured - validation is TypeScript compilation + Vite build
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc --noEmit to check types. 2. Run npm run build to verify production build succeeds.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Changes must pass TypeScript compilation.
key_patterns: EditableImage component wraps tags for admin-swappable images using SiteContentContext. EditableText does the same for text. The admin sees a camera overlay on hover to replace images. SiteContentContext stores overrides keyed by string IDs (e.g., 'hero.image', 'about.image'). The DesignCard uses raw without EditableImage, making design photos NOT admin-editable. Lightbox also uses raw . Framer Motion is used for all animations.
directory_structure: src/components/ - all UI components. src/context/ - React contexts (Theme, Favorites, SiteContent, Admin). src/data/ - static data (designs catalog). src/utils/ - utilities (images, whatsapp, sanitize). src/services/ - Supabase services. src/lib/ - auth, supabase client.
